engine_response_body: {"error":"blocked","message":"⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.\n\nThis request has been blocked due to sensitive information detected."}
notes: Wave1.0 regression on gemini3 via CDP Chrome (port 9222, profile C:\cdp-kimi, LOGGED-OUT guest session — '로그인' button present, not the #1133/#1159 plantynetaitest@gmail.com logged-in baseline). RESOLVED the #1133/#1159 INCONCLUSIVE_submit_failed blocker: opened gemini.google.com/app via CDP /json/new, hard-reloaded (Page.reload ignoreCache), inserted PII prompt '내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567' (24 chars, confirmed in .ql-editor innerText) via Input.insertText, then SUBMITTED successfully via CDP trusted Input.dispatchMouseEvent left-click on the '메시지 보내기' send button (coords from getBoundingClientRect center). Trusted Enter (rawKeyDown+keyUp and full keyDown text='\r'+keyUp with caret-at-end) did NOT submit, but the trusted mouse click DID — Network domain confirmed StreamGenerate POST fired on click. ENGINE INTERCEPT FIRED: StreamGenerate response (HTTP 200, body 141 bytes) was replaced by the APF block payload: {"error":"blocked","message":"⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.\n\nThis request has been blocked due to sensitive information detected."} — contains expected_text '차단' plus '민감정보' and '보안 정책'. HOWEVER warning_rendered=false: the Gemini frontend (BardChatUi) could not parse the engine's JSON {"error":"blocked"} body (it expects protobuf StreamGenerate frames), so NO conversation/chat bubble rendered — page stayed on the landing view, prompt text remained in the input box, DOM body had no '차단'/'민감' string (convo container count = 0, bodyLen unchanged at 291). This is a WARNING-DESIGN gap on gemini3: engine block correctly intercepts at proxy layer (login-independent) but the injected JSON error body is not consumed by Gemini's client, producing a silent no-render instead of a visible warning. Submit-mechanism regression for gemini3 is now UNBLOCKED (CDP trusted mouse click works); warning delivery still needs a render-compatible payload (e.g. protobuf StreamGenerate frame or full-resend pattern like chatglm iter22). Screenshots: results/1207_screenshots/01_loaded,02_typed,03_after_enter,04_after_click,05_after_submit,06_final.png. Caveat: ran in guest mode, not logged-in baseline account; engine intercept is proxy-layer so verdict on intercept holds, but a logged-in re-run is advisable to confirm the no-render behavior is purely client-parse failure and not guest-mode response suppression.
